commit.subject: LU-19186 kernel: debug posix acl xattr issue
commit.message:
LU-19186 kernel: debug posix acl xattr issue

This is a fortestonly patch to debug the posix acl xattr issue.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=4 mdscount=2 \
  clientdistro=el9.6 serverdistro=el9.6 testlist=sanity

Change-Id: Ided98ef6d00f8aef751a95376693afce76da33e1
Signed-off-by: Jian Yu <yujian@whamcloud.com>
